raw.message: No boundaries, just battles. Unleash Hell wherever your day takes you!

hook.summary: A split-screen UGC testimonial comparing Day 1 to Day 200 of gameplay.
hook.visual_action: A woman speaks to the camera in a split-screen format above early-game dungeon footage.
hook.voiceover_transcript: Day one in Diablo Immortal. I selected the Demon Hunter, picked up a Rusty Crossbow and cleared my first dungeon.

scene_flow: Introduction of 'Day 1' gameplay with a UGC testimonial and basic combat.
Transition to 'Day 200' featuring the creator in cosplay and high-level group combat.
Final call-to-action screen with cinematic character art and store links.
audience_proxy: Fans of action RPGs and the Diablo franchise who value long-term character progression.
